heading: Rules and regulations
label: 1742 Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary is authorized and directed to make such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1967— substituted “Secretary” for “Commissioner”.Pub. L. 90–191950—Act , substituted “Commissioner” for “Administrator”.Apr. 20, 1950
amendments: Amendments1967— substituted “Secretary” for “Commissioner”.Pub. L. 90–191950—Act , substituted “Commissioner” for “Administrator”.Apr. 20, 1950
